title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
